{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Lampson
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Dawn and Darkness (novel)|Of Dawn and Darkness]]
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Lampson]] is an alchemist who deals primarily in organ processing and storage.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Lampson]] has pure black hair.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
